question: Confirm the initial account classes and the minimum safe metadata needed to distinguish them.
context: Resolved evidence gate. The initial portfolio contains two asset/deposit products and one credit liability. Safe explicit selection uses institution, owner label, account class/type, ZAR, and masked suffix.
decision: The initial scope contains two asset/deposit products and one credit-liability product. Institution, owner label, explicit account class/type, ZAR currency, and masked distinguishing suffix are sufficient; full account identifiers and credentials are neither required nor stored.
